news.summary: In March 2025, the international gold market has shown significant growth, with the COMEX gold futures price surpassing $3,040 per ounce on March 18. Concurrently, the London spot gold price reached $3,030 per ounce, marking new historical highs. The World Gold Council's "Global Gold Demand Trends Report" for 2024 revealed that global central banks have acquired over 1,000 tons of gold annually for the past three years. Data from the People's Bank of China and the State Administration of Foreign Exchange indicate that China's central bank gold reserves have expanded for three consecutive quarters, totaling 73.45 million ounces, underscoring the escalating demand for secure investment assets.
news.headline: Gold prices hit record highs with COMEX futures at $3,040/ounce & London spot at $3,030/ounce. Central banks purchased 1,000 tons of gold in 2024. China's central bank holds 73.45 million ounces.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency industry needs to prioritize real-world utility and improving user experience in order to gain widespread acceptance and rebuild trust among the public. This approach aims to increase the adoption rate and expand the user base. By focusing on these aspects, crypto can appeal to a larger audience and establish itself as a reliable and beneficial technology. It is crucial for the industry to address these key areas to achieve its goal of becoming more widely utilized and trusted.
news.headline: Coindesk's CONSENSUS 2025 reveals crypto's need for mainstream adoption through user-friendly, practical applications.

news.summary: Guardian Capital LP revealed today that the distribution for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund (TSX: GUTB.U) was inaccurately reported in Canadian dollars in the press release from March 17, 2025. As the units of the Fund are in U.S. dollars, the correct distribution is USD$0.1725 per ETF unit. The ex-dividend date, record date, and payment date for the distribution remain the same.
news.headline: Guardian Capital corrected cash distribution for Guardian Ultra-Short U.S. T-Bill Fund to USD$0.1725 per ETF unit.

news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, on March 27, 2025, Melcor Real Estate Investment Trust (Melcor REIT) received a favorable recommendation from Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) for the amended and restated plan of arrangement with Melcor Developments Ltd. The arrangement includes redeeming outstanding trust units in exchange for $5.50 per unit. Details of the arrangement can be found in the REIT's management information circular on SEDAR+ and the REIT’s website.
news.headline: ISS recommends Melcor REIT unitholders vote FOR plan of arrangement with MRD. Offers $5.50 per unit.

news.summary: The convergence of artificial intelligence (AI) and blockchain technology is allowing for decentralized ownership of data and seamless real-time integration, leading to more accurate predictions. This fusion of AI and blockchain is revolutionizing the way data is managed and exchanged, resulting in enhanced predictive capabilities. By leveraging this innovative combination, individuals and organizations can have greater control over their data while also benefiting from improved decision-making processes.
news.headline: In Coindesk's CONSENSUS 2025 (Part 2), AI and blockchain merge to empower decentralized data control and enhance predictions.

This surge is attributed to regulatory clarity and the rising trend of tokenization. This trend is reshaping the overall landscape of the crypto market and indicating a growing acceptance and integration of digital assets within traditional investment frameworks.

news.summary: Circle Pharma, a biopharmaceutical company based in South San Francisco, will have its CEO, David Earp, JD, Ph.D., present at upcoming investor conferences. Earp is scheduled to speak at the 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9, 2025, from 11:45 a.m. to 12:25 p.m. ET, followed by the Stifel 2025 Virtual Targeted Oncology Forum from 1:30 p.m. to 1:55 p.m. ET on the same day. The company specializes in developing cell-permeable macrocycle therapeutics.
news.headline: Circle Pharma will present at two virtual conferences on April 9, 2025. CEO David Earp will speak at 11:45 a.m. - 12:25 p.m. ET and 1:30 p.m. - 1:55 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Based in Pacific Palisades, California, Ocampo Capital LLC, a venture firm founded by consumer executive Karl Bracken, recently completed the final close of Ocampo Capital Fund I LP. This fund, targeting early-stage consumer brands and innovative companies in the commerce sector, has successfully secured funding. Ocampo Capital Fund I has already invested in seven companies: Cohere Commerce, Persephone Biosciences, Semaine Health, Small Wonder, Zeya, Future Fans, and Edu.
news.headline: Ocampo Capital Fund I LP closes successfully, targeting early-stage consumer brands. 7 investments made so far.

news.summary: The recent report from The Wall Street Journal indicating that President Donald Trump's tariffs set for April 2 may not be as harsh as anticipated has been well-received by the markets. Investors are optimistic as this news suggests that the tariffs could be less severe than initially thought, leading to a positive reaction in key market indicators. The reassurance brought by the report has helped stabilize market sentiments, with numbers reflecting a hopeful outlook for the upcoming tariff implementation.
news.headline: Markets optimistic as President Trump's April 2 tariffs may be less severe than expected, per Wall Street Journal report.

The positive momentum comes after a previous decline in Dow Jones futures. Investors are closely watching the market as they prepare for the expected tariffs.

news.summary: SEC Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw has criticized the SEC for downplaying risks in the US stablecoin market in its new guidelines. She disagreed with the decision to classify stablecoins meeting certain criteria as "non-securities" and exempt from reporting requirements. Crenshaw argued that the SEC's analysis is inaccurate and fails to recognize that over 90% of USD-stablecoins are distributed through intermediaries. Many in the crypto industry, however, see the SEC's decision as a positive step, with some expressing optimism and viewing it as progress in the crypto space. Crenshaw also raised concerns about the SEC's reassurance regarding issuer reserves, stating that stablecoins always carry risk, especially during market stress. This debate comes in light of stablecoin issuer Tether undergoing an audit to verify its backing ratio.
news.headline: SEC's Crenshaw criticizes US stablcoin guidelines for downplaying risks, while industry sees it as progress. Over 90% distributed via secondary market. SEC reassurance on sufficient reserves "grossly inaccurate." Many in industry optimsitic. Stablecoins face risks, especially during market stress.

news.headline: Tether CEO hints at new stablecoin if USDT ousted from US, Europe. USDT may see exit. Paolo Ardoino shares long-term vision.

news.summary: Integrating AI-powered connectivity with top-notch security features, the groundbreaking Giant Stream6 is revolutionizing home WiFi. The WAVLINK Giant Stream6, an AI-Enhanced AX6000 Router, made its debut on Kickstarter and has quickly gained traction in the tech industry. This advanced router boasts impressive speeds and cutting-edge security protocols, providing users with unparalleled performance. Since its launch just two days ago on April 4, 2025, it has garnered significant interest, signaling a promising future for home WiFi technologies.
news.headline: WAVLINK Giant Stream6 WiFi 6 Router gains strong support on Kickstarter, surpassing goal within 48 hours.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) price may surge back to $100,000 faster than expected as it appears to be decoupling from the US stock market and gold. While BTC initially dropped to $82,500 due to President Trump's tariff announcement, it rebounded to $84,700. In contrast, the S&P 500 plunged 10.65%, and gold slipped 4.8%. The anticipated price recovery follows a pattern where gold leads and Bitcoin follows, suggesting significant outperformance by BTC. However, the BTC/XAU ratio is showing a bearish fractal, hinting at potential decline to $65,000 or below if macro conditions worsen. Despite concerns about a US recession due to Trump's tariff war, leading to underperformance of risk assets like Bitcoin, most bond traders expect three rate cuts until September according to CME data. This article does not provide investment advice.
news.headline: Bitcoin traders anticipate rally to $100K as decoupling from stocks and gold trend emerges. Bitcoin bounces from $82,500 to $84,700 while S&P 500 tumbles 10.65%. Gold dropped 4.8%. BTC could follow 2018-2019 trend to hit $100K. Analysts predict a Bitcoin surge over gold. Bitcoin-to-gold ratio suggests drop to $65K, possibly hitting EMA level. US recession fears could hamper Bitcoin bullish outlook. Fed chair signals high-rate environment. Traders betting on three rate cuts by September.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.3%, with an estimated 10.1 million people currently out of work. This marks an increase of 2.5% from the previous quarter. Additionally, the report stated that the economy shrank by 4.8% in the last year, and inflation has reached a record high of 10.5%, putting further strain on households. Experts attribute these concerning economic trends to the ongoing global pandemic and its impact on businesses across various sectors. The government has announced plans to implement stimulus measures to address the growing economic challenges and support those affected by job losses. Despite these efforts, the road to recovery is expected to be slow and challenging.
news.headline: Tariff fear causes stock selloff, tune in for latest updates on Bloomberg's Balance of Power - Late Edition.
Wall Street hit by global recession trade over tariff retaliation, market in turmoil.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking the lowest rate in the past decade. The economy has added 250,000 jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the GDP growth has reached 6.2%, showing a strong recovery from the previous downturn. This positive trend is attributed to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing and construction sectors. The government plans to implement further economic policies to sustain this growth momentum and create more job opportunities in the coming months.
news.headline: Tariff concerns cause stock selloff; tune in to Balance of Power: Late Edition for insights.

news.summary: PacBio, a top provider of precise sequencing platforms, based in Menlo Park, California, made an announcement today that its Compensation Committee granted a non-qualified stock option to Jim Gibson, the new Chief Financial Officer. The option covers 342,432 shares of PacBio common stock and was awarded under the Pacific Biosciences 2020 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan on March 31, 2025. This grant aligns with Nasdaq Marketplace Rule 5635(c)(4) regarding inducement awards for new hires.
news.headline: PacBio awards Chief Financial Officer, Jim Gibson, 342,432 stock options under the 2020 Inducement Plan on March 31, 2025.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, a new product called Blackmagic PYXIS Pro Handle and Blackmagic PYXIS Pro Grip has been introduced. These accessories are designed to enhance the functionality of the Blackmagic PYXIS camera, turning it into a versatile run-and-gun camera suitable for broadcast and documentary projects. This innovation aims to provide greater flexibility and ease of use for professionals in the field.
news.headline: Blackmagic Design introduces PYXIS Pro Handle and Pro Grip to enhance flexibility of PYXIS camera for broadcast and documentary work.

news.summary: In Spring, Texas, recent news indicates that the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of a company, David Mansfield, has announced his retirement after eight years in the position. The retirement is set to take place on or before November 8, 2025. In light of this development, Saleh Sagr has been appointed as the new President of the company. Despite his retirement as CEO, Mansfield will continue to serve as a director of the company until his retirement date, facilitating a seamless transition for Mr. Sagr.
news.headline: Perma-Pipe CEO David Mansfield to retire on or before Nov 8, 2025. Saleh Sagr appointed as President.

news.summary: In Montreal, Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX-DNG) advises shareholders to vote on the Gold Proxy to safeguard their investment at the expensive special shareholder meeting called by iolite Capital Management AG on April 16, 2025. The Dissident wants to rush the process, despite Dynacor's annual meeting scheduled just two months after the Requisitioned Meeting.
news.headline: Dynacor Group advises shareholders to vote on Gold Proxy to safeguard their investment at Requisitioned Meeting in face of iolite Capital Management AG.
